heading: JIMMY CARTER NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
label: LIX–FFF JIMMY CARTER NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
notes: Codification, which enacted this subchapter, originally established the Jimmy Carter National Historic Site, which is listed in a table of National Historic Sites under , National Park Service and Related Programs. The amendments made by effectively redesignated the site as the Jimmy Carter National Historical Park, after which the text of was set out as this subchapter.Pub. L. 100–206section 320101 of Title 54Pub. L. 116–341Pub. L. 100–206
